heading: Annual reports to Congress
label: 1136 Annual reports to Congress
text: At the opening of each session of Congress, the Secretaries of Agriculture and Interior shall jointly report to the President for transmission to Congress on the status of the wilderness system, including a list and descriptions of the areas in the system, regulations in effect, and other pertinent information, together with any recommendations they may care to make.
notes: Termination of Reporting RequirementsFor termination, effective , of provisions of this section relating to transmission to Congress of annual report on status of wilderness system, see , as amended, set out as a note under , Money and Finance, and pages 48, 110, and 149 of House Document No. 103–7.May 15, 2000section 3003 of Pub. L. 104–66section 1113 of Title 31
